commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh There is one that speaks like the piercings of a sword: but the tongue of the wise brings health. Septuagint, "there are, who speaking, wound with the sword; but "Hebrew bote (Haydock) means also, making a foolish promise, which causes remorse. (Menochius) This was the case with Herod, when he was pleased with Herodias, Matthew xiv. (Calmet) Hebrew, "speaketh like the piercings of a sword "(Protestants; Haydock) as detractors, and those who disseminate impious and scandalous maxims do.
